prompt: Create a breathtaking hyper-realistic cinematic digital artwork of a stylish young man sitting alone on the hood of a glossy black luxury sports car in the middle of a vast empty desert during a surreal total solar eclipse. The man is centered in the foreground, facing the camera, seated casually on the front hood with one leg crossed downward and both hands tucked in his pockets. He has short dark styled hair and wears a rugged brown suede jacket over a black turtleneck or high-neck shirt, loose black cargo pants, black leather boots, a silver chain necklace, bracelets, and subtle luxury accessories. The sports car is low, sleek, and aggressive, shown from the front three-quarter angle with a reflective black body, sharp LED headlights glowing warm amber, visible right-side wheel, dark tinted windows, and sand dust coating the lower panels. Behind him, show rolling desert dunes and distant rocky mountains under a dark golden sky. A massive black eclipsed sun hangs in the upper left background with an intense glowing orange corona, casting dramatic rim light around the subject. Add swirling rings and streams of golden sand across the sky and around the car, with exactly two large visible sand vortex arcs: one sweeping from the lower left across the middle toward the upper right, and one curling in the upper right sky. Include many small glowing ember particles and sparks floating throughout the frame, especially near the foreground and eclipse. Use a warm orange, bronze, and black color palette, high contrast, volumetric dust, cinematic depth of field, ultra-detailed textures, dramatic backlighting, realistic shadows, glossy reflections, and a vertical portrait composition. Make the scene epic, mysterious, luxurious, and apocalyptic, with no text, no logos, and no extra people.
